title: ageratina jaliscensis
intro: Ageratina jaliscensis, also known as the Jalisco Hillside Eupatorium or Mexican White Sage, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ageratina jaliscensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of arthritis, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce stress. Ageratina jaliscensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
